name: open-skills
description: Reusable, inspectable skills for AI coding agents — every skill is readable Markdown, and 39 of 57 also carry a declarative YON (YounndAI Object Notation™) protocol you can validate. Review, planning, deliberation, orchestration, priming, and more. Apache-2.0.

plugins.name: open-skills
plugins.description: Reusable skills for AI coding agents. Every skill has a readable SKILL.md; 39 of 57 also carry a declarative protocol.yon with named steps, rules, and gates validated structurally by @younndai/yon-parser. Validation does not enforce runtime obedience. Read before you trust.
